A New Dawn
About the Project

Architecture of Light

M Aurora draws inspiration from the shifting, dynamic beauty of the aurora lights — embodying fluidity, transformation, and clarity. Through contrasting colours, vertical fins, and purposeful negative space, it creates a landmark visible from both Old Klang Road and the NPE highway.

🏢
By Mah Sing Group

Investment

Why Invest in M Aurora

1
Freehold in Prime KL Address
Freehold properties in prime KL locations historically command premium resale values and stronger capital appreciation. Old Klang Road is an established, mature township with proven demand.
2
Exceptional Transport Connectivity
KTM stations at 500m & 600m walking distance, plus the future MRT3 at 2.5km. Properties near rail transit command higher rental yields and stronger tenant demand.
3
Strong Rental Demand Catchment
Surrounded by schools, universities, hospitals and malls — consistent tenant demand from students, working professionals and medical staff.
4
Trusted Developer — Mah Sing Group
—
Publicly listed with decades of track record, above-average QLASSIC scores, and M Concierge professional property management post-handover.
5
MRT3 Future Upside
MRT3
The upcoming MRT3 Circle Line station at Jalan Klang Lama (2.5km) will significantly boost property values in the Old Klang Road corridor upon completion.
Rental Yield Potential
4–6%
Estimated gross rental yield for units in the Old Klang Road area, based on prevailing market rates for comparable new launches.
Capital Appreciation
~15–25%
Historical capital appreciation in comparable freehold serviced residences along the OKR–Mid Valley corridor over a 5-year holding period.
Near Future MRT3 Station
2.5 km
Properties within 3km of an MRT station historically see 10–20% value premiums upon operations commencement, based on MRT1 & MRT2 corridor data.
Total GDV
RM 660 Mil
Significant GDV reflects strong developer confidence in the site's potential. Mah Sing's track record shows consistent sell-through on comparable urban launches.

FAQ · Frequently Asked Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Is M Aurora freehold or leasehold?
M Aurora is Freehold — you own the property permanently with no expiry of land title.
Which tower is open for sale now?
Tower B is NOW OPEN — Type A (556sf), Type B (737sf), and Type D (916sf). Tower A is Coming Soon — register your interest now to be notified first.
What is the starting price?
Tower B units start from RM 339,000 (Type A, 556sf). Tower A pricing is TBA. Contact June for the latest pricing and floor selection.
What is included in the sales package?
Current package includes: Free SPA Legal Fee, Free Loan Legal Fee, Free Loan Stamping, Free Shuttle Bus. Units are partially furnished (A/C, kitchen cabinet with hood & hob, water heaters). Limited slots — first come, first served.
When is the expected completion date?
Vacant Possession (VP) is expected in 2030. Mah Sing has a strong track record of on-time or early delivery.
Can foreigners buy M Aurora?
Yes, foreigners can purchase M Aurora subject to prevailing state government guidelines and minimum purchase price thresholds. Contact June for the latest eligibility details.
What is the loan eligibility / margin of finance?
Generally up to 90% Margin of Finance (MOF) for residential properties, depending on your credit profile and bank assessment. June can assist with referrals to trusted bankers.
What is the Co-Living programme?
M Aurora has an exclusive partnership with Malaysia's #1 Co-Living operator — 7–9% ROI vs 3–5% traditional rental, fully managed, 0% management fee, TNB bill absorbed. No effort required from owners.
How close is M Aurora to the KTM / MRT?
KTM Jalan Templer is 500m walk, KTM Petaling is 600m walk. The future MRT3 Circle Line along Jalan Klang Lama is approximately 2.5km away.
Is there a show unit I can view?
Yes! The Sales Gallery & Show Unit is NOW OPEN. WhatsApp June at +6013-9699853 to schedule your visit or arrange a virtual walkthrough.

Still have questions? WhatsApp June — happy to help anytime.
